outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected; negative GEX environment accelerates price swings.
outlook.summary: Market is in a negative gamma regime (-2.1B total GEX). Dealers will amplify moves: selling into weakness, buying into strength. Price is trapped between the 555 support and 570 resistance, with a strong magnetic pull towards the 580 Max Pain.

levels.motivazione: Systemic structural pivot. While below spot, deeply negative GEX (-2.1B) keeps the market in a volatile 'short gamma' state.
Immediate support below spot. High Put OI (13.5k) and massive Volume (69k) in 0DTE indicate strong defensive positioning.
Confluence level. Primary 0DTE Call resistance (8.9k OI) aligns with major Monthly Put hedging (37.9k OI).
RESONANCE level. 0DTE Max Pain, Top Call Wall (Monthly), and Top Put Wall (Weekly). Acts as major magnet and resistance.
RESONANCE level. Major structural support. Top Put OI in 0DTE (21k) and significant OI in Weekly/Monthly.

outlook.summary: Extreme bullish positioning with reverse smirk skew and ultra-low PCR (0.03-0.04). Spot at 6445.75 with nearest support cluster at 6350-6380. Positive gamma environment suppresses volatility. All visible strikes are ITM calls creating layered support. 6200 represents RESONANCE level across all expiries. Caution: extreme bullishness may signal overextension.

levels.motivazione: Closest significant support to spot (65 pts). 173 VOL indicates active hedging interest. First line of defense for longs.
High volume concentration (244 VOL). Forms tight support cluster with 6380. Key intraday pivot.
Highest weekly volume (305 VOL). Major support zone. Break below triggers acceleration toward 6270.
Highest 0DTE volume (80 VOL). Secondary support zone. Intraday hedging anchor.
Only non-zero OI in 0DTE (134 OI). Deep structural support. Indicates large existing position.
RESONANCE across ALL expiries: 0DTE (51 VOL), WEEKLY (64 VOL), MONTHLY (208 VOL - highest). Triple confluence creates magnetic attraction. Major structural anchor.
Structural gamma equilibrium. Far below spot (15%). Confirms positive gamma regime suppressing volatility. Not immediate trading level.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative GEX (-0.61B total) amplifies price swings
outlook.summary: Extreme 0DTE put buying (PCR 2.71) with bearish smirk skew across all expiries indicates fear. Negative total GEX creates volatile conditions. Max Pain convergence at 24100-24300 zone provides strong upward magnet. Watch 23300-23200 support; target 24000-24300.
